components.name: VPC + Networking
components.notes: VPC module config straightforward; NAT gateway + subnet tagging correct first try

components.name: EKS Cluster
components.notes: Module v21.15 variable renames caused 2 correction cycles; AWS provider 6.x dependency; addon bootstrap chicken-and-egg required manual intervention

components.name: IAM Roles + Pod Identity
components.notes: IRSA roles for EBS CSI + LB Controller correct; Helm release for LB Controller wired properly

components.name: Namespace Structure
components.notes: PSS labels on apps namespace correct first try; clean YAML

components.name: ArgoCD Install + Config
components.notes: Helm chart version mapping (9.x not 7.x) needed correction from skill file; ArgoCD 3.2.6 installed cleanly; RBAC + values correct first try

components.name: App-of-Apps Pattern
components.notes: Root app + namespace child app correct; needed repo secret for private GitHub access

components.name: Sync Waves + Ordering
components.notes: Wave -10 for namespaces works; drift detection test needed fix (annotation tracking only monitors managed fields)

components.name: Kyverno Install
components.notes: Skill file webhook config was wrong (list vs map for chart 3.7.0); CRD annotation too large required ServerSideApply; clean reinstall after stale sync

components.name: Kyverno Policies (6 policies)
components.notes: All 6 ClusterPolicies correct first try; enforce in apps namespace only; audit mode for NetworkPolicy check

components.name: Kyverno Policy Interactions
components.notes: Pod rejection tested via dry-run; 5 policies fire correctly on non-compliant pod; no false positives in system namespaces

components.name: Falco Install
components.notes: Skill file had wrong chart version (4.x vs 7.x); write_etc_common macro removed in 0.42.x; DaemonSet + eBPF correct first try

components.name: Falco Custom Rules
components.notes: 5 custom rules (3 general + 2 EKS-aware) correct; one macro fix needed; Falcosidekick with Prometheus metrics working

components.name: ESO + Secrets Manager
components.notes: ESO 1.3.2 API version v1 (not v1beta1); ArgoCD sync cache stale after API fix; IRSA + ClusterSecretStore correct; secret synced

components.name: RBAC
components.notes: ClusterRoles + namespace-scoped RoleBindings correct first try; cross-namespace denial verified

components.name: NetworkPolicies
components.notes: Default deny + DNS allow + ingress allow correct first try; pod-selector matching verified

components.name: Prometheus + Grafana
components.notes: kube-prometheus-stack 82.1.0 deployed cleanly; remote write receiver enabled; 1 correction for kubectl run stdout noise in tests

components.name: OTel Collector Config
components.notes: Chart 0.145.0 requires explicit image.repository (breaking change from 0.89+); k8s image lacks prometheusremotewrite exporter, needed contrib; DaemonSet mode disables service by default

components.name: Grafana Dashboards
components.notes: Platform Overview dashboard with 8 panels correct first try; ConfigMap sidecar provisioning worked immediately

components.name: Alert Rules
components.notes: 4 custom PrometheusRules correct first try via additionalPrometheusRulesMap

components.name: Backstage Install
components.notes: Helm chart 2.6.3 (image 1.9.1) deployed cleanly; 1 correction for Kyverno livenessProbe in test dry-run; catalog ConfigMap approach for private repo

components.name: Software Templates
components.notes: deploy-service and create-namespace templates correct first try; skeleton produces Kyverno-compliant resources

components.name: Backstage Plugin Wiring
components.notes: Static file catalog via ConfigMap mount; 4 catalog entities loaded; ArgoCD/K8s annotations correct

components.name: E2E Integration
components.notes: 7 cross-component tests; 2 fixes needed: NetworkPolicy blocks pod-to-service egress (used localhost), Falco non-interactive exec not logged (switched to /etc write marker)

components.name: TLS + cert-manager
components.notes: cert-manager 1.19.3 deployed cleanly; 1 fix for Application YAML in subdirectory (app-of-apps doesn't recurse); HTTP-01 ClusterIssuers Ready

components.name: Resource Quotas + PDBs
components.notes: ResourceQuota and 5 PDBs correct first try; ArgoCD Application pattern reused cleanly

components.name: Documentation
components.notes: SECURITY.md (8 sections), COST.md, ADR-007 all correct first try; gitleaks allowlist for known test secret

components.notes: 7 ADRs written across all phases; MADR format consistent
